caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits in a room filled with clothing and framed photos. His t-shirt features the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK". He is positioned behind a professional black microphone. In the background, a white mannequin wears a white shirt, and clothing racks are visible. The walls are decorated with numerous framed photographs. On-screen graphics include a logo in the bottom left and red text in the bottom right that reads "BEEFY RELY TOT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated, leaning slightly back with one arm resting on the chair. His facial expression shifts slightly as he looks toward someone off-camera, transitioning from a small smile to a more neutral, focused expression while continuing to engage in a conversation.
